channel.title: OOP on Home
channel.description: Recent content in OOP on Home

item.title: Swedish Crossword Puzzle, Built from Scratch in Java
item.description: A complete Swedish-style crossword game in Java Swing — 19 classes across three packages, with abstract square hierarchies, an on-screen random-key keyboard for hint squares, and a single-keyboard listener that swaps cleanly as the user clicks around the board.
